plain.en: Father of mercy, who called Blessed Victoria to be a faithful servant in your Church and to strengthen your people in their faith in times of trials and persecutions; grant that through her prayers, we may be filled with your Spirit in order to work for the spreading of your Kingdom. Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son, who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit, one God, for ever and ever.

en.text: Father of mercy, who called Blessed Victoria
to be a faithful servant in your Church
and to strengthen your people in their faith
in times of trials and persecutions;
we may be filled with your Spirit
in order to work for the spreading of your Kingdom.
Through our Lord Jesus Christ, your Son,
who lives and reigns with you in the unity of the Holy Spirit,
one God, for ever and ever.
